creator: j1594016@ed.kagu.sut.ac.jp
text:
I've made a port ja-wine-97.11.30.tar.gz.It was made from Wine-971130 + Japanese
patch + Freebsd patch. This is based on  ports/emulator/Wine-xxxxxxxx
written by se@FreeBSD.ORG.

I put port packed with 'tar + gzip' and 
uuencode below "FIX:".

Packed list is ...

japanese/ja-wine:

drwxr-xr-x  2 j1594016  bin   512 Jan 14 01:31 files
drwxr-xr-x  2 j1594016  bin   512 Jan 14 05:16 patches
drwxr-xr-x  2 j1594016  bin   512 Jan 14 01:31 pkg
